---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, module, or enhancement for KoBar
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: eedali

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when I try to use the Color Picker and [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (Is this a completely new module for the sidebar, or an enhancement to an existing tool like AI Hub, Snippet Vault, or KoBox?)

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context or Mockups**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. (Since KoBar is highly visual, if you have UI mockups or ideas on how the new button/panel should look on the KoBar sidebar, please share them!)
